Grandelius, Nils (2662) - Carlsen, Magnus (2840)
TePe Sigeman & Co Chess Tournament 2026 (Chess.com) [02] 2026.05.02
A65 Benoni, 6.e4

1.d4 Nf6 2.c4 e6 3.Nc3 c5 4.d5 exd5 5.cxd5 d6 6.e4 g6 7.Be2 Bg7 8.Be3 O-O 9.Nf3 Bg4 10.Nd2 Bxe2 11.Qxe2 Nbd7 12.O-O Ne8 13.f4 f5 14.exf5 gxf5 15.Bf2 Nc7 16.Nf3 Nf6 17.Qd3 b5 18.Nxb5 Nxb5 19.Qxb5 Rb8 20.Qd3 Ne4 21.Rab1 Qa5 22.Ng5 Qd2 23.Qh3 Nxg5 24.fxg5 Rxb2 25.Rxb2 Qxb2 26.Qh5 Qxa2 27.g6 h6 28.Qf3 a5 29.h4 a4 30.Qf4 a3 31.Qxd6 Qb2 32.Bxc5 a2 33.Qe6+ Kh8 34.Kh2 Qe5+ 35.Qxe5 Bxe5+ 36.Kh3 Rd8
